title: 3000 x Wedding Rose Petals, Artificial Silk Rose Petals for Party Decorations Confetti Table Scatter Romantic Valentine's Day (Ivory/Cream)
features: 💖 3000 pieces pink petals: made of silk fabric. Non-toxic and will not fade from the sun or liquids.It looks extremely realistic, making it a great accent for your party or wedding. Each petal measures 5cm x 4.5cm.

💖DIY ALL SHAPES: After separating the petals piece by piece, you can decorate the scene in different shapes, such as the heart shape, letters, along the aisle or simply scattered on the table or in the air.

💖 Various colours: various colours available, you can choose different colours to match different party themes. Flower petals combined with a mysterious atmosphere can definitely impress your loved one, which will never fade over time.

💖ROMANTIC DECORATION: Sprinkle these petals on the floor, bed, table, along the aisle at a wedding (including a proposal party, meeting place, romantic birthday party or Thanksgiving wedding and craft trip, etc.), shower the newly married couple with the flower petals.
💖OUR SERVICE: 100% customer satisfaction is our top priority, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description Silent and romantic love 3000pcs are enough to scatter you on the bed or on the floor to build a world of flowers. Bright colors combined with a mysterious atmosphere can really impress your loved one, which will never disappear over time. An unforgettable surprise for your lover. Scatter the rose petals on the bed previously to give your loved one a big surprise. Great decoration for wedding, proposal, Valentine's Day, birthday, anniversary or any other romantic moment. Great Wedding Decoration With bright colors and exquisite workmanship, these rose petals can be spread along the middle aisle in front of the bride or be a great ornament on the dining table to create a romantic atmosphere and warm atmosphere. Suggested quantity: For throwing: 12-18 petals per guest; For table decoration: 50-100 petals per table, by light spraying; For aisles, cover by 100 petals: 1 square foot for dense surface, 2 square feet for moderate area, 5 square feet for bright surface; Material: The flower petals are made of artificial silk. No harm to health and the environment. Package includes: Each package includes 3000pcs of realistic 5x5cm/2"x2" rose silk petals for weddings.
